title: Sinker (smuggler)
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]|the [[Sinker/Legends|clone trooper]]}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Sinker |homeworld= |birth=c. [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' establishes that Sinker is about sixteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old during the events of the novel, which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]; therefore, Sinker must have been [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] around [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]. |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Huxlings]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Dialogue|Jerf Huxley|Sinker, what the frost are you doing? That's not a toy.|Sinker|I'm not doing it.|Mara Jade Skywalker|He's right. He's not doing this either.|attr=Jerf Huxley and Sinker react to Mara Jade Skywalker moving her lightsaber in Sinker's hands with the Force|src=}} '''Sinker''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] around [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]] and worked with [[Jerf Huxley]]'s [[Huxlings]], a group that worked for [[Talon Karrde]] of the [[Smugglers' Alliance]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], he participated in a confrontation at an Outer Rim [[Jerf Huxley's cantina|cantina]] where Huxley attempted to extract a severance payment from [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] after she terminated the business relationship with Huxley on Karrde's behalf. Huxley instructed Sinker to confiscate [[Anakin Skywalker's second lightsaber/Legends|Jade Skywalker's lightsaber]]. Once he took the [[Melee weapon/Legends|weapon]], Jade Skywalker used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to ignite and [[Telekinesis/Legends|move]] the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] while he still held it, creating a distraction that allowed her [[Marriage/Legends|husband]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to assist. After the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] overcame Huxley, Sinker returned the lightsaber to Jade Skywalker. ==Biography== {{Quote|Get her lightsaber.''"
"''Get—uh—?''"
"''You deaf? What are you afraid of?|Jerf Huxley and Sinker|}} [[Reproduction/Legends|Born]] around [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Sinker was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'', including Sinker's appearance, to [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]. when he was about sixteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, Sinker worked with the [[Huxlings]] under [[Jerf Huxley]], a man who did business in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] with [[Talon Karrde]] of the [[Smugglers' Alliance]].''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' After he became a legitimate businessman, Karrde sent his long-time agent [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] to Huxley's Outer Rim [[Jerf Huxley's cantina|cantina]] to sever their working relationship. Huxley foresaw the move and brought along a group of Huxlings, including Sinker, and a replica [[Droideka/Legends|droideka]] to overpower and extract a severance payment of five hundred thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from Jade Skywalker. [[File:MaraLightsaber_SurvivorsQuestJP.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Mara Jade Skywalker with her lightsaber]] During the confrontation, Huxley ordered Sinker to confiscate [[Anakin Skywalker's second lightsaber/Legends|Jade Skywalker's lightsaber]], which he hesitantly complied with. A [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and [[Force-sensitive/Legends|powerful]] in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], she used [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]] to ignite and move the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] while Sinker still held it. He surprised Jade Skywalker by maintaining his grip on the [[Melee weapon/Legends|weapon]] even as she forced it to swing wildly around the room. With the crowd of around twenty of Huxley's underlings' attention on Sinker, Jade Skywalker's [[Marriage/Legends|husband]] and fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], stepped in to take out the droideka with [[Luke Skywalker's green lightsaber/Legends|his own lightsaber]]. As Skywalker incapacitated the [[Droid/Legends|droid]], his wife overpowered Huxley and forced him to call off the attack. At her mercy, Huxley acquiesced and she made arrangements to pay him twenty thousand credits as thanks for his ten years of service to Karrde. The conflict now resolved, Sinker returned the lightsaber to Jade Skywalker, who reattached it to her [[Belt/Legends|belt]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Uh … I'm—I'm sorry, ma'am, but—|Sinker stammers while speaking to Mara Jade Skywalker|}} Sinker was frightened of Jade Skywalker's [[Force power/Legends|powers]] and visibly shook with nerves and stammered when he took her lightsaber. Although Sinker was intimidated by Jade Skywalker, he did not lose his grip on the lightsaber when she manipulated it with the Force, much to the Jedi's surprise. ==Behind the scenes== Sinker first appeared in the [[2004]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' novel ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'', written by [[Timothy Zahn]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Sinker (Schmuggler) |hu=Sinker }} [[Category:Huxlings]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
